results.query: SELECT hp.run_id, hp.param_name, hp.param_value, hp.param_type, er.hardware_tag, er.random_seed, a.name, a.family, a.task_type FROM cs->hyperparameter  hp INNER JOIN cs->experiment_run  er ON er.id = hp.run_id INNER JOIN cs->algorithm a ON a.id = er.algorithm_id WHERE er.status = 'Completed'
